message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Find all a vaccination documents in EPD

actor HCP

box "Community A"
participant "GFPP/PIS" as GFPP #00CC00
participant "Aggregator" as Agg #00CC00
participant "CO-Registry" as COReg #gray
participant "CO-Repository" as CORepo #gray
participant "CO-IGW" as COIGW #00CC00
end box

box "Community X"
participant "OC-RGW" as OCRGW #cyan
participant "OC-Registry" as OCReg #cyan
participant "OC-Repository" as OCRepo #cyan
end box

HCP -> GFPP : [01] Get all immunization data
GFPP -> Agg : [02] query all registries
Agg -> COIGW : [03] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
COIGW -> COReg : [04] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
COReg -> COReg : [05] Lookup Data
COReg -> COIGW : [06] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
COIGW -> COIGW : [07] request all communities
COIGW -> OCRGW : [08] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-38]
OCRGW -> OCReg : [09] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
OCReg -> OCReg : [10] Lookup Data
OCReg -> OCRGW : [11] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
OCRGW -> COIGW : [12] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-38]
COIGW -> COIGW : [13] end loop
COIGW -> COIGW : [14] Assemble Query Responses
COIGW -> Agg : [15] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
Agg -> GFPP : [16] list of document info
GFPP -> GFPP : [17] retrieve all documents
GFPP -> COIGW : [18] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
COIGW -> CORepo : [19] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
CORepo -> CORepo : [20] allocate document data
CORepo -> COIGW : [21] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
COIGW -> OCRGW : [22] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-39]
OCRGW -> OCRepo : [23] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
OCRepo -> OCRepo : [24] allocate document data
OCRepo -> OCRGW : [25] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
OCRGW -> COIGW : [26] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-39]
COIGW -> COIGW : [27] Assemble Retrieve Responses
COIGW -> GFPP : [28] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
GFPP -> Agg : [29] Aggregate documents
Agg -> GFPP : [30] one FHIR ch-vacd document
GFPP -> HCP : [31] Show immunization data

center footer Version 1.0
@enduml
```
